This is a testharness.js-based test.
[PASS] lang only on slot
[PASS] lang only on host
[PASS] lang on host and slot
[PASS] lang on host and slotted element
[PASS] lang on host and slot and slotted element
[FAIL] lang on slot inherits from shadow host
  assert_true: element matches expected language en-GB expected true got false
Harness: the test ran to completion.
